title: RelayerResponse
description: Represents an OpenZeppelin Relayer instance for managing blockchain transactions across EVM, Solana, and Stellar networks.

network.description: Blockchain network identifier (e.g., mainnet, goerli, solana-mainnet)

address.description: On-chain address associated with the relayer

paused.description: Whether the relayer is currently paused

policy.description: Transaction policy configuration for the relayer

signer_id.description: Reference to the signer used by this relayer

notification_id.description: Optional reference to a notification channel

created_at.description: Timestamp when the relayer was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the relayer was last updated

RelayerPolicy.description: Policy settings controlling relayer transaction behavior

gas_price_cap.description: Maximum gas price in wei the relayer will accept

private_transactions.description: Whether to use private/dark-pool transaction submission

min_balance.description: Minimum relayer balance threshold in wei
